case_title: PATEL, N. R. vs. WILLIAMS, JOSEPH AND DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $12.14. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R.
